title: Comparing Your Real Options for PayPal Alternatives for Nigerian Creators — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a Nigerian digital creator trying to sell ebooks, courses, or software, but PayPal blocks your account, you're not alone. PayPal's geographic restrictions leave many creators stranded. That's why you need a reliable PayPal alternative that lets you collect payments without hassle. In this post, we'll explore your real options and help you find the best solution for your business.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal alternatives like Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip have their own set of rules and restrictions. Stripe, for instance, has its own list of blocked countries, including Nigeria. Gumroad, on the other hand, is more permissive but charges higher fees. Payhip is another option, but it also comes with fees and limited features. In contrast, Core Shop Engine offers a robust backend with automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, all without requiring a payment processor account. This means you can focus on creating and selling your digital products without the hassle of managing multiple payment gateways.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip all have their own policies for handling restricted countries. Stripe, for example, may restrict access to certain features or services for accounts from certain countries. Gumroad, on the other hand, may block creators from certain countries altogether. Payhip's policies are less clear, but it's likely to follow a similar pattern. Core Shop Engine, however, takes a more inclusive approach, allowing creators from any country to use its services without restriction. This means you can sell your digital products to customers anywhere in the world without worrying about being blocked.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, Core Shop Engine stands out from the competition. With Core Shop Engine, you can receive payments instantly, without the need for a payment processor account. This means you can get paid faster and keep more of your hard-earned money. In contrast, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip all charge fees ranging from 2.9% + $0.30 to 5% + $0.30 per transaction, depending on the country and payment method. Core Shop Engine, on the other hand, charges a flat fee of $0.15 per transaction, making it a more cost-effective option for creators.
Don't let PayPal's restrictions hold you back – choose Core Shop Engine and start selling your digital products today!
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are also a key consideration when choosing a PayPal alternative. Core Shop Engine's backend engine allows for seamless automation of delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, making it easy to manage your sales and customers. In contrast, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip require more manual effort to set up and manage automation, which can be time-consuming and prone to errors. With Core Shop Engine, you can focus on creating and selling your digital products, while the platform takes care of the rest.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which PayPal alternative is right for you? If you're looking for a robust backend with automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, Core Shop Engine is the clear winner. Its flat fee of $0.15 per transaction and instant payment processing make it a cost-effective and efficient option for creators. Don't let PayPal's restrictions hold you back – choose Core Shop Engine and start selling your digital products today.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

Can I use Stripe if I am in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan? Unfortunately, no, Stripe has its own list of blocked countries and will not allow you to create an account from these countries. However, Core Shop Engine offers a complete PayPal alternative solution that lets you collect payments without hassle, regardless of your location.
Core Shop Engine is the ultimate PayPal alternative for creators in restricted countries – no account restrictions, no fees, and no hassle!
